codeReview.summary: SECURITY.md created successfully at repository root with all required elements: vulnerability reporting instructions, GitHub Security Advisories contact method/link, clear scope definition of what constitutes a vulnerability (4 categories), supported versions table, and response timeline. Implementation fully satisfies VAL-GH-001 requirements.

summary: Feature community-security-md PASS. SECURITY.md exists at repo root with vulnerability reporting instructions, GitHub Security Advisories contact method and link, clear vulnerability scope definition covering schema bypass, referential integrity violations, DoS, and injection attacks. VAL-GH-001 fully satisfied.
